steps.title: Read the direct comparison
steps.content: The underlined sentence says Uncle Katsuhisa was as loud as the narrator's father was quiet. That sentence directly contrasts the two characters by placing opposite traits side by side.

steps.title: Rule out unrelated functions
steps.content: Choice A mentions discussion topics, which the sentence does not list. Choice B adds a feeling about meeting people. Choice D describes a conversation, but the text only describes Uncle Katsuhisa's noisiness. The underlined sentence functions as a contrast between Uncle Katsuhisa and the narrator's father. The answer is C.
